characters.name: Andre
characters.description: AndreAndre on theamber planetAppears inLost in Space(2018 TV series)Debut2.04ScarecrowPortrayed byAdam BogenBornEarthStatusAliveOccupationEngineerGenderMaleSpeciesHumanShipResoluteAndrewas an engineer who worked as a member of the maintenance team on-board theResolute. He, like the rest of them, ended up on theamber planetafter theResolutewas attacked byScarecrow. He was present whenDon Westarrived on the planet and told the group he was back, holding his arms out as if he'd get a happy reaction. Instead, when he approached the group, Andre punched him.Avathen helped Don up, telling him that there was a pool to see who would punch him first. ("Scarecrow")

characters.name: Anton Penn
characters.description: Anton Pennwas either a member of the24th Missionor a crewmember on theResolute. He was stranded on theamber planet. Duringthe Robot's attack on theResolute, he discovered security chiefNeil Cairdon the ground unarmed and with a broken ankle. To Caird's great surprise, he helped him by dragging him to safety.Maureen Robinsonlearned of this story and told it to Caird in a bid to help support her plan for a mutiny againstCaptain Kamal. Kamal planned to leave behind those stranded on the amber planet, but after Caird heard that Penn was stranded on the planet, he supported the mutiny plan by closing the doors to the bridge of theResolute, cutting off the security team that would have ejected Maureen. ("Unknown") Anton Penn is only mentioned in dialogue onNetflix'sLost in Space.

characters.name: Athena the Lorelei
characters.description: Athena the Lorelei Athena the Loreleiwas one of thePeople of the Green Mist. She encountered theJupiter 2when it was re-fueling. Athena the Lorelei and her people survive on atomic fuel so she followed the ship in search of sustenance. Athena the Lorelei used some kind of hypnotic or telepathic powers to lureDr. Smithoutside the ship in hopes of delaying the ship so she could feed.

characters.name: Peter Beckert
characters.description: Peter BeckertAppears inLost in Space(2018 TV series)Debut1.04The Robinsons Were HerePortrayed byAdam Graydon ReidStatusDeceasedGenderMaleAffiliationsVictor DharJohn RobinsonPeter Beckertis a character onNetflix'sLost in Space. He is one of the survivors who crashes on theunknown planet. He handlesVictor Dhar's affairs. Peter Beckert is later killed when he is caught by hostilerobotswhile on a salvage patrol on therainforest planetwithJohn Robinsonafter making the ill-advised move of using a flashlight. ("Three Little Birds") Peter Beckert is portrayed byAdam Graydon Reid.

characters.name: BK Hapgood
characters.description: BK HapgoodAppears inLost in Space(2018 TV series)Debut2.04ScarecrowPortrayed byBradley StrykerStatusAliveGenderMaleSpeciesHuman BK Hapgoodis a character onNetflix'sLost in Space. His last name was inspired by the character ofJimmy Hapgoodfrom theoriginal Lost in Space seriesepisode "Welcome Stranger". While on theamber planet, he metJudy Robinsonand asked her if she was the stock girl. He told her that he had banged his knee and she told him that she was a doctor and she would be happy to take a look at it. He told her that he didn't need a doctor, only a bandage. She began gathering one up, but he rudely snatched it from her and walked away. ("Scarecrow")

characters.name: Blarp
characters.description: BlarpAppears inLost in Space (1998)Portrayed byGary Hecker (voice)SpeciesBlarp/BlawpAffiliationsPenny RobinsonTheblarpis a semi-sentient female alien creature, described in the script and some spinoff novels as a "lizard monkey" encountered by the crew of the Jupiter 2 in the 1998Lost in Spacemovie. The blarp vaguely resembles an Earth monkey, but with hairless, usually yellow skin, four nostrils, amphibious traits, and incredibly large ears and eyes which blink sideways. The blarp is a timid but friendly and sociable creature who longs for companionship, and upon meeting Penny the two form an instant bond. The blarp is a timid but friendly and sociable creature who longs for companionship, and upon meeting Penny the two form an instant bond.

characters.name: Businessman
characters.description: character nameBusinessmanPortrayed ByEdward FoxAffiliationsGlobal Sedition Abusinessmanof theGlobal Sedition, this role was originally slated to be played byJonathan Harrisas a cameo but Harris turned it down not willing to appear as any character other thanDoctor Smith. This character hired Smith to sabotage theJupiter 2, but later betrayed him, leaving him stranded as the ship launched. He only appears in the film via hologram, his position in the Sedition and other details are left unclear, but it was shown that he wanted to stop the Jupiter Mission at all costs.

characters.name: David Robinson
characters.description: David RobinsonAppears inThe Robinsons: Lost in Space(2004 unaired TV pilot)Portrayed byGil McKinneyGenderMaleSpeciesHumanMotherDr.Maureen RobinsonFatherColonelJohn RobinsonBrothersWill RobinsonSistersJudy RobinsonPenny Robinson David Robinsonis the eldest son of John and Maureen Robinson in the 2004 pilot ofThe Robinsons: Lost in Space. David is around seventeen or eighteen and has a teenaged sister, Judy; a younger ten-year-old brother Will; and an infant sister named Penny. David struggles with his own identity in the shadow of his famous father who saved Earth from alien invaders. David feels inferior to both John and his genius younger brother Will. David seems to get along well with most of his family, but there is an unresolved tension in the family arising from a lack of open communication.

characters.name: Debbie the Bloop
characters.description: DebbieAppears inLost in Space(1965 TV series)Debut1.03Island in the SkyBornPriplanusGenderFemaleSpeciesChimpanzeeAffiliationsPet ofPenny RobinsonDebbie, also called the Bloop after the only sound it ever made, is a chimpanzee-like character on the original 1965 television seriesLost in Space. Debbie is a small black-furred creature resembling an Earth chimpanzee but with long pointed ears and a large cranium. Debbie is a sweet and gentle creature who grew quite fond of the Robinsons and eventually a deep bond with Penny, rarely ever being too far from her. She was also a bit cowardly and tended to hide away whenever danger presented itself. Debbie is a sweet and gentle creature who grew quite fond of the Robinsons and eventually a deep bond with Penny, rarely ever being too far from her. She was also a bit cowardly and tended to hide away whenever danger presented itself. Debbie also enjoyed receiving attention and playing with others, often doing tricks or learning from Penny. Her love of attention ultimately encouraged her to stay with Winimal Films to become a star.

characters.description: Prisha DharAppears inLost in Space(2018 TV series)Portrayed byVeenu SandhuStatusAliveGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanShipJupiter 4RomancesVictor Dhar(husband)SonsVijay Dhar Prisha Dharis the wife ofVictor Dharand the mother ofVijay Dharin Netflix's 2018 television series Prisha and her family, in the Jupiter 4, are members of the 24th colonist group that crash-land on anunknown planet. She makes it back to theResolute.

characters.name: Victor Dhar
characters.description: Victor DharAppears inLost in Space(2018 TV series)Portrayed byRaza JaffreyStatusAliveOccupationColonial representativeGenderMaleSpeciesHumanShipJupiter 4Affiliations24th MissionRomancesPrisha Dhar(wife)SonsVijay Dhar"John, I represent every member of this colonist group, even you.""John, thank you."- Victor Dhar andJohn Robinson, "Danger, Will Robinson" Victor Dharis one of the new male characters inNetflix's 2018 television seriesLost in Space. He's a politician who was elected as leader and representative of the Robinsons' group of colonists. Victor is one of the survivors of a Jupiter crash-down encountered by the Robinson Party. Upon learning that they are alive, he quickly begins giving orders toMaureen.

characters.description: DianeAppears inLost in Space(2018 TV series)Portrayed byAmelia BurstynStatusAliveTitlesRadooOccupationRadar Operations OfficerGenderFemaleSpeciesHuman Dianeis an original character in Netflix's 2018 television seriesLost in Space. Dianne is one of the survivors of a Jupiter crash-down encountered by the Robinson Party in Episode 1-04.

characters.name: Doctor Smith (Original Series Role)
characters.description: Zachary SmithAppears inLost in Space(1965 TV series)Debut1.01The Reluctant StowawayPortrayed byJonathan HarrisBornZachary SmithNovember 6, 1945New York CityStatusAliveAlso known asDoctor Smith, Colonel Smith, Daddy ZackTitlesColonel with the United States Space CorpsGenderMaleSpeciesHumanAffiliationsThe RobotDr. Zachary Smith, B.Sc. (Hons.), Ph.D.is an intergalactic doctor of environmental psychology. He was the United States Space Corps' staff psychologist and environmental expert prior to his unexpected departure from Earth. He was an agent for an enemy foreign government. Prior to the launch of the Jupiter 2 from Earth, Dr. Smith reprogrammed the Robot to destroy the ship eight hours after departure. While making last-minute adjustments to ensure a successful sabotage, Dr. Smith subdued a guard on duty aboard the spacecraft, possibly killing him. He was later trapped aboard the Jupiter 2 while attempting to reactivate the Robot, which had been shut down by a technician. The crew were protected from the effects of lift-off in their state of suspended animation, but Dr. Smith was forced to endure it fully conscious. The ship is thrown off course by Dr. Smith's additional weight and becomes hopelessly lost. It was later revealed in the series that this course deviation prevented the destruction of the Jupiter 2 in a violent meteor shower soon after lift-off. Zachary Smith was born in November 6, 1945. He spent most of his earliest years in Lower Manhattan, New York City, until his parents were killed in a boating accident. The young Smith later then went to live with his Great Aunt Maude and Great Uncle Thaddeus Smith in Marietta, Georgia. Aunt Maude was the matriarch of the Smith family, and she raised Zachary with a stern hand. In his own words, the doctor admitted that he sometimes had 'a tendency to be lazy,' but the determined lady pressured him into obtaining reasonable grades at school. Aunt Maudes’ husband, the late Thaddeus Smith, was an eccentric, superstitious, and bizarre person who had been a bad influence on young Zachary. The radical change in Dr. Smith's character is attributed to the magnetic fields generated by the ship's propulsion device, which can, and will, produce permanent brain damage in any life forms not protected by the freezing tube during full-powered liftoff. As could be predicted, the use of 100% of engine power when leaving Earth's atmosphere affected the unshielded doctor's mind. Within two or three weeks the behavior of the colonel grew more and more bizarre, and within a year, his exposure to the magnetic fields that propelled the interstellar ship would leave the man a shell of his former self. The Robinsons went through vigorous testing when they were chosen to become the first pioneer space family; Smith, however, received none of this testing. Like astronauts of today, the Robinsons would have had to pass many psychological tests to ensure their fitness to serve aboard a long-duration mission. Smith had non
characters.personality_section: The radical change in Dr. Smith's character is attributed to the magnetic fields generated by the ship's propulsion device, which can, and will, produce permanent brain damage in any life forms not protected by the freezing tube during full-powered liftoff. As could be predicted, the use of 100% of engine power when leaving Earth's atmosphere affected the unshielded doctor's mind. Within two or three weeks the behavior of the colonel grew more and more bizarre, and within a year, his exposure to the magnetic fields that propelled the interstellar ship would leave the man a shell of his former self. The Robinsons went through vigorous testing when they were chosen to become the first pioneer space family; Smith, however, received none of this testing. Like astronauts of today, the Robinsons would have had to pass many psychological tests to ensure their fitness to serve aboard a long-duration mission. Smith had none of that testing, and a good case could be made that all the stress of the mission on an untrained person, not to mention the numerous dangers with which Smith came into contact on Priplanus, finally caused him to begin losing his mind little by little. Smith was also a xenophobe who was constantly being forced into contact with aliens. This alone could also have caused a personality change.

Smith was also a xenophobe who was constantly being forced into contact with aliens. This alone could also have caused a personality change.

characters.name: Don West (2004)
characters.description: Don WestAppears inThe Robinsons: Lost in Space(2004 TV pilot)Portrayed byMike ErwinOccupationPilotGenderMaleSpeciesHumanAffiliationsUnited Global Space ForceRomancesJudy RobinsonMajorDon Westis a main character of the 2004 unaired television pilotThe Robinsons: Lost in Space. Mike Erwin played MajorDon Westin the 2004The Robinsons: Lost In Spacepilot. He is the youngest pilot to ever command his own squad, and graduated at the top of his class. Don reveres his idol, military leader, John Robinson. Don attends a farewell party for the retiring John Robinson and then while there he meets Judy, however he has no idea that Judy is John Robinson's daughter. Later that same night, Judy sneaks out of the house to meet the handsome young pilot, they become lovers for her last night on Earth. Later, aboard the Space Station Jupiter, Don meets Judy again. However he discovers that she is actually the daughter of his idol, Military Leader John Robinson. Terrified that he has put his military career in jeopardy by romancing Judy the night before, Don tells Judy to stay away from him and abruptly walks away. After the aliens attack the Space Station, Don finds Judy and leads her back to the Jupiter 2 Space Pod. Don is still aboard when the Pod jettisons from the space station leaving Don stranded aboard along with the Robinsons.

characters.name: Don West (Original Series Role)
characters.description: Don WestAppears inLost in Space(1965 TV series)DebutNo Place to HidePortrayed byMark GoddardTitlesMajorGenderMaleSpeciesHumanAffiliationsUnited Global Space ForceRomancesJudy RobinsonMajorDon Westis a main character of the original 1965 television seriesLost in Space. He is the pilot of theJupiter 2. He was an officer in theUnited States Space Corps, and the air force. In an emergency, if something went wrong with the crafts automatic guidance system, he would be awakened from suspended animation to correct the problem. Don's military training has proved useful in resolving a number of tense moments. He is also adept at overpowering aliens with his strength, but despite this he has suffered injuries more often than anyone else in the crew. This may be partly due to the fact that he seems to have a susceptibility to concussions which makes it easier for him to fall unconscious if he hits his head hard. He once described his roles on the ship as astronaut, plumber, gas station attendant, fixer-upper and radio announcer. He was the only one who could pilot theJupiter 2, though he seemingly later taught this ability to the other members of the crew. The original pilot introduced him as Dr. Donald West from theCenter for Radio Astronomy- who had produced a groundbreaking theory on the habitability of other planets in 1996. The novel follows this, describing him as a young scientist who was onboard the Jupiter 2 when it was lost Don has a varied rapport with the others on the mission. If it were up to Don, Dr. Smith would be left behind. Don respectsJohn Robinson, but sometimes questions his judgement. He is obviously attracted to Judy, but his feelings for her are often implied rather than overt. Despite being a top-notch pilot, Don seems to have a problem avoiding crash landings. His nickname was "Crash West" Don often reveals a violent temper that must be occasionally reined in by Prof. Robinson. During the latter part of the series, Don showed signs of mental instability. Killing Don off in the unmade 4th season was considered, according to fan rumour. In "Voyage to the Bottom of the Soul", a Lost in Space Graphic novel, he marriesJudy Robinson"The Epilouge" , a special feature on the 2015 Blu Ray release, confirms this. They had a son,Joshua Robinson West

characters.name: Dr. Luna
characters.description: Dr. LunaAppears inLost in Space(2018 TV series)Debut2.04ScarecrowPortrayed byChris ShieldsStatusAliveOccupationDoctorGenderMaleSpeciesHumanShipResoluteDr. Lunais a character onNetflix'sLost in Space. He is portrayed byChris Shields. After arriving on theamber planet,Judy Robinsonreported to the tent for the first-year medical interns and met Dr. Luna. She introduced herself, stating thatDr. Carrollwas her attending physician. He welcomed her back, telling her that they had a few off-site facilities that needed to be restocked. She asked him if he was unaware that when they were stranded, she was the only doctor on site and had treated patients, some of which were in critical condition. He told her that she was now back under his supervision and that all first-year interns had to follow protocol. ("Scarecrow") A while later on, he was present at the base camp on the amber planet where Judy arrived with a patient who had been badly injured at one of the wells on the planet due to damage from therust virus. She informed him that the patient had a possible spine fracture and head trauma, as well as multiple contusions. She agreed with his assessment that the patient likely had internal injuries, stating that his pulse was weak and that irregular oxygenation was compromised, with his temperature dropping. ("Run")

characters.description: EvanAppears inLost in Space(2018 TV series)Debut1.05TransmissionPortrayed byIain BelcherDiedUnknown planetCause of deathCrushed by fuel tankStatusDeceasedOccupationElectricianGenderMaleSpeciesHumanShipUnknown JupiterBrothersKai Evanis a minor character onNetflix's 2018 television seriesLost in Space. "Can you turn down the air, it's getting cold in here."- Evan's last words before going into shock and dying.

characters.name: Farnum B.
characters.description: Farnum B. Farnum Bis aLost in Spacecharacter who is a space entrepreneur and stars in two episodes. In "A Day at the Zoo," Farnum B is the owner of an intergalactic zoo, who intends to capture all of the Robinsons and put them on display. Farnum has a fascination with masks and wears a huge red mask when first seen by Penny. When Farnum removes his mask, he looks the 'classic' villain...twirly moustache and all. Farum also had a non-verbal assistant who is a caveboy named Oggo. Dr. Smith and Oggo eventually take over the Circus. Penny helps to reunite Oggo and Farnum and Farnum returns the Robinsons back home to the Jupiter 2. Before leaving, Farnum promised to turn over a new leaf. Farnum usually is dressed like a big top conductor and wears a blue-violet top hat along with a purple suit coat, red pants, a vest of dark blue with silver stars, and a white frilly ascot. Farnum B is back in episode, "Space Beauty." Farnum is NOW working for an unknown mysterious client who is from the Planet of Shadows. Farnum is being paid to collect contestants for a beauty pageant. Not only is Farnum working for this mysterious client...but the client has purchased Farnum's soul. The winner of the pageant will marry the mysterious client. However the client if a being made of fire...from a planet that is also of fire. Every time Farnum appears greedy or mischievous...he forms an evil smile and his face turns a bright glowing red. All he needed to do next was twirl his moustache to appear the classic evil villain. Judy wins the pageant, but when the fire client shows up...Will and Don use a machine to make it snow...the snow destroys the fire client.
